<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class Engine
{
    public function run(string $expression): mixed
    {
        return eval('return ' . $expression . ';');
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class Engine
{
    /** @var array<string, callable(int): int> */
    private array $ops = [
        'double' => fn (int $v): int => $v * 2,
    ];

    public function run(string $op, int $value): int
    {
        return ($this->ops[$op])($value);
    }
}
